title: VIB UGENT - Part 1
author: Opentrons
description: This protocol is part 1 of a series for the VIB UGENT protocol. [This protocol performs steps 1-19 of this detailed protocol description.](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-user-files-01/u-4256/uploads/2023-01-31/ok13urr/VIB-UGENT_Customized_protocol_S-trap_steps.xlsx). The protocol will automatically pause if it runs out of tips.
steps_raw: This protocol is part 1 of a series for the VIB UGENT protocol. [This protocol performs steps 1-19 of this detailed protocol description.](https://s3.amazonaws.com/pf-user-files-01/u-4256/uploads/2023-01-31/ok13urr/VIB-UGENT_Customized_protocol_S-trap_steps.xlsx). The protocol will automatically pause if it runs out of tips.
Add SDS and sample to pixul plate.
materials_raw: Opentrons 24 Tube Rack with Eppendorf 1.5 mL Safe-Lock Snapcap
Opentrons 10 Tube Rack with Falcon 4x50 mL, 6x15 mL Conical
Opentrons P20 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
Opentrons P300 Single Channel Electronic Pipette (GEN2)
